  Educating Poverty Out of Existence

  

  
  We believe that education is the most powerful path to lasting change — and our global community proves it every day.

School for Life is a member of the Australian Council for International Development and adheres to the ACFID Code of Conduct and the ACFID Fundraising Charter. Complaints relating to a breach of the ACFID Code of Conduct can be made to the ACFID Code of Conduct Committee. 

School for Life Foundation is a registered charity in Australia, the United States and Uganda. In Australia, School for Life Foundation is endorsed as a Deductible Gift Recipient. Your donations of $2 and over are tax deductible. 

In the USA, School for Life is endorsed as a s501(c)(3). Please visit our US donation page for donation details.

© School for Life Foundation 2025

  THE HEART OF WHO WE ARE

  

  
  Big Change Starts With Bold Belief

  

  
  We’re working to educate poverty out of existence — one school, one student, and one community at a time.

  

    
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
  
  We Started With One School — Now We’re Building a Movement

  

  
  In 2008, two young Australians, Annabelle Chauncy OAM and David Everett OAM, saw firsthand how a lack of access to education was keeping communities trapped in poverty. But they didn’t want to give handouts — they wanted to create lasting solutions.So they partnered with local leaders in Uganda to build a school that offered more than just academics.   Transforming Education, Together

  

  
  COLLABORATING FOR GREATER IMPACT

  

  
  Across East Africa, we partner with community-rooted organisations that share our belief: that quality education is one of the most powerful tools for breaking the cycle of poverty.These partnerships allow us to go further — reaching more vulnerable children, supporting local leaders, and strengthening systems from within.By sharing what works and co-creating what’s needed, we provide our partners with tailored capacity-building, infrastructure investment, and tools from our holistic education model. Together, we’re expanding access to quality education, improving health and wellbeing, and nurturing a new generation of prosperity makers.

careers.title: Work With Us | Empower Through Education — Get Involved Today — School for Life
careers.description:
Join us at School for Life to support quality education and community 
uplift in East Africa. Explore opportunities to get involved and make a 
difference.

  Partners in Purpose

  

  
  Working Together to Create Lasting Impact

  

  
  At School for Life, we believe change is never a solo effort. Our work is made possible by the generosity and commitment of like-minded partners — individuals, businesses, and organisations who share our vision of a world where every child has access to quality education.Whether you're supporting a single project or walking with us for the long haul, your partnership helps us deliver real, measurable impact — from classrooms and clinics to communities and careers.
